philosophySection.title: Team Philosophy
philosophySection.subtitle: Great products are not created by isolated developers. They are built by small, focused, cross-functional teams.
philosophySection.desc: All aligned around one goal — making your product succeed.

work01.title: Dedicated
work01.description: Each team is fully committed to your project. No context shifts, no distractions.

work02.title: Responsible
work02.description: We take full responsibility for the outcome, not just completing tickets.

work03.title: Optimized
work03.description: Balancing speed, stability, and revenue to ensure business growth.

StepsSection.subtitle: Your product is built by a team with a proven track record of end-to-end delivery.

step01.title: Launched apps with millions of users

step02.title: Survived App Store rejections and complex compliance

step03.title: Scaled systems under real-world massive traffic
